---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Definition of the variables:
- treatment indicator (0 = ZDV only; 1 = ZDV + ddI, 2 = ZDV + Zal, 3 = ddI only)
- hemo hemophilia (0=no, 1=yes)
- drugs history of IV drug use (0=no, 1=yes)
- oprior Non-ZDV antiretroviral therapy pre-175 (0=no, 1=yes)

```{r}
# Load the package
library(ucimlrepo)

# Fetch the dataset by its UCI ID (890)
aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175 <- fetch_ucirepo(id = 890)

# View metadata
print(aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175$metadata)

# Access features and targets
features <- aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175$data$features
targets  <- aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175$data$targets


str(features)


```
